name: Northwind Vendor Red-lines
description: Northwind's sell-side red-lines — the positions our deal desk requires before signing a customer's MSA or order form. We are the vendor, so these protect us from over-broad liability and slow payment.

custom_rules.title: Liability cap must not exceed 1x fees
custom_rules.description: As the vendor, we cap our aggregate liability at 1x trailing fees; a higher cap is a red-line.

custom_rules.title: Payment terms must be at least Net 30
custom_rules.description: We do not accept payment terms shorter than Net 30.

custom_rules.title: No uncapped or unlimited indemnity
custom_rules.description: We strike any 'unlimited' or 'uncapped' indemnity language.

custom_rules.title: Governing law must be Washington or Delaware
custom_rules.description: We require Washington or Delaware governing law on our paper.

custom_rules.title: Internal cross-references must resolve
custom_rules.description: A dangling section reference is an authoring defect we ask the customer to fix before signature.
